result.markdown: --- title: "Week 2: Time series graphics" --- ::: {.cell} ::: ## What you will learn this week * Different types of plots for time series including time plots, season plots, subseries plots, lag plots and ACF plots. * The difference between seasonal patterns and cyclic patterns in time series. * What is "white noise" and how to identify it. ## Pre-seminar activities - Read [Chapter 2 of the textbook](https://otexts.com/fpp3/graphics.html) and watch all embedded videos ## Tutorial exercises - Complete Exercises 6, 7, 11 from [Section 2.10 of the book](https://otexts.com/fpp3/graphics-exercises.html). - [Tutorial learning objectives](tute-lo.qmd). ## Assignments * [IA1](../assignments/A1.qmd) is due on Friday 13 March. * [GA1](../assignments/G1.qmd) is due on Tuesday 24 March. ## Weekly quiz * [Week 2 quiz](https://learning.monash.edu/mod/quiz/view.php?id=3868) is due on Wednesday 11 March.
